response.text:
REJECT
rationale: Local SoC critically low at 11%; sharing suspended until recovery to 40% threshold and grid reconnection—cannot support outbound energy during islanded deficit crisis.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.22 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC critically low (11%). Network-wide deficit crisis. All outbound sharing suspended until SoC ≥ 0.40 and grid reconnection achieved. Prioritize load shedding and grid recovery. Reject all incoming requests with explanation of local survival threshold..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
